## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Arena.im to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Traffic metrics show strong growth: 837 clicks, 69k impressions (best week yet)](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [New CTA implementation planned for articles, awaiting finalized designs](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Backlink strategy to be explored further, with guidance from GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Content refresh efforts showing promising results for many articles](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)

## Topics

### Traffic and Performance Update

  - [Best week yet for clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [837 clicks and 69,000 impressions since last meeting](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Reached 10,000+ impressions per week (13,000 this week)](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Cumulative growth in clicks and impressions trending upward](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)

### CTA Implementation

  - [New conversion panels introduced by Luis](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Paola created copy for top and bottom of funnel CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Implementation process seems complex, awaiting finalized designs](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [Plan to add CTAs to all 128+ published articles](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Top of funnel CTAs for newsletter subscriptions](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [Bottom of funnel CTAs for product signups/demos](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Middle funnel CTAs (for eBooks) on hold for now](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)

### Content Optimization Strategies

  - [Interlinking: Connect top 20 performing articles to boost SEO](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
  - [Content enrichment: Expand best-performing articles with visuals, examples, and improved formatting](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [Update content for 2025 where applicable (e.g., listicles, SEO titles)](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Suggestion to create "2024 in review" type content for year-end](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [Interest in exploring backlink opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [GrowthX team to provide guidance on potential approaches](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [Discussed automated outreach and relationship-building with relevant brands](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Arena team received inquiries from backlink vendors recently](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)

  - [50 total refreshes completed to date](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)

  - [Monitoring performance of refreshed content over 8-week periods](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
  - [New V2 workflow for content refreshes includes gap analysis, keyword optimization, and interlinking](https://fathom.video/share/hpQRfMGonNJ-7GNqxhPoHTxm-84GBc1u?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
